arts.ttl: Win or bust for Steve Clarke’s side – Scotland versus Poland talking points
arts.sum: The result will decide Scotland’s fate in this Nations League and determine both their place in the next one and the World Cup qualifying draw seeds.

arts.ttl: Scotland boss Clarke refuses to confirm if star man Doak will start must-win clash with Poland
arts.sum: Steve Clarke has warned that he won't gamble on playing Ben Doak against Poland if he feels that two games in four days would place too much strain on the teenage winger.

arts.ttl: Clarke maintains cautious stance on Scotland's Doak
arts.sum: Head coach Steve Clarke maintains a cautious stance on Scotland winger Ben Doak before the Nations League match against Poland.

arts.ttl: Poland in disarray ahead of showdown with Scots after 5-1 thrashing and THAT Ronaldo selfie
arts.sum: For Poland, the recriminations from a 5-1 thrashing to Portugal rumble on. On and off the pitch, an air of turmoil surrounds the team.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak could be DROPPED for crucial Scotland clash with Poland as Steve Clarke reveals brutal reality
arts.sum: The showing against Croatia may not be enough for the wonderkid to keep his spot in Warsaw

arts.ttl: Poland squad in chaos after Cristiano Ronaldo selfie debacle but Piotr Zielinski defiant before Scotland clash
arts.sum: Zielinski is having the flak he and his teammates have come on for following 5-1 Nations League drubbing

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'to hold talks' over Wojciech Szczesny contract as Hansi Flick, Deco devise goalkeeper plan
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly want to tie goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny down to a new contract until 2026, even though he is yet to make his first-team debut for the Blaugrana.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak is exhibiting the quality to be an elite weapon for Scotland
arts.sum: The forward is impressing and Clarke is ready to unleash him for Monday’s Nations League decider with Poland Even Steve Clarke cannot help himself any more. Scotland’s manager spent months warning a football nation to temper excitement around Ben Doak. Friday evening’s starring role for the 19-year-old as Scotland defeated Croatia, where in one outrageous first-half moment he bamboozled the £77m Josko Gvardiol, led Clarke to drop his guard. “Ben is a young player that we need to protect and look after,” he said. “But I realise he is good for now and hopefully for a long time in the future.” In other words: I will continue to pick him. Clarke had been correct to douse the noise around Doak, a player who had turned heads long before he departed Celtic for Liverpool in 2022. Scottish inability to produce anything like an acceptable number of elite, game-ready young footballers means the public latch on to any potential star. Far more fall by the wayside than justify the hype. For every Billy Gilmour, there are umpteen Oliver Burkes. Holding out for heroes has meant outlandish exaggeration. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: How to watch Poland vs Scotland – live stream TV and kick off details for final Nations League clash
arts.sum: Scotland's Nations League campaign comes to an end and they could still finish second or bottom
